arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus starts, Gabriel Magalhaes decision made, Arsenal predicted XI vs Fulham
arts.sum: The Gunners dropped five points against Fulham last season that Arteta admits were crucial in the title race. “Unfortunately it’s not that easy,” he said when asked about gaining those points back this season.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal Premier League score predicted as tense clash unfolds
arts.sum: Next up for the Gunners is a fifth league game in a row in London, with Arsenal travelling west to take on Fulham. Arsenal will be looking to keep up their winning form of late when they take on London rivals Fulham in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Arsenal face six-year overhaul of summer plans after being shunned in latest FIFA revamp - Tom Canton
arts.sum: The reason why there is a good chance that Arsenal may indeed not play in the States this summer is due to the expanded Club World Cup. Previously involving only the winners of the respective Champions League iterations of each footballing federation, 2025 marks the first year of the 32-team tournament kicking off. For the past three years, Arsenal have travelled to the United States for their summer pre-season plans.

arts.ttl: LIVE: In-form Arsenal face London rivals Fulham
arts.sum: Tune in for live updates from Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta suffers fresh Arsenal injury blow as team news confirmed for Fulham clash
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Oleksandr Zinchenko is absent from the Gunners squad to face Fulham on Sunday due to injury, the club confirms.

arts.ttl: Fulham v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: A London derby at Craven Cottage, 2pm UK time kick-off Any comments or thoughts? You can email Daniel As for Arsenal, they’re without the injured Zinchenko, so Thomas Partey moves to full-back with Jorginho coming into midfield, while in attack, it’s Leandro Trossard not Gabriel Martinelli. Marco Silva makes four changes to the side which beat Brighton. Out go Castagne, Wilson and Muniz, who are on the bench, with Kenny Tete, Sasa lukic and Raúl Jiménez coming in; also missing is Reiss Nelson, injured, but unable to play against is parent club in any case, and his spot goes to Adam Traoré. arts.ttl: Emile Smith Rowe sends warning to Arsenal ahead of reunion with boyhood club
arts.sum: Emile Smith Rowe has sent a message to Arsenal ahead of Fulham's Premier League meeting with the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live scores, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta makes changes in defence as Gunners aim to cut gap to leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Fulham host Arsenal, Brighton travel to Leicester and Ipswich take on Bournemouth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: ‘Bukayo Saka wouldn’t get into Stoke City team’
arts.sum: Former Watford striker Troy Deeney has bizarrely claimed that Arsenal superstar Bukayo Saka wouldn’t get into Tony Pulis’ Stoke City team. After Arsenal beat Man Utd 2-0 on Wednesday thanks to two goals off set-pieces, the Gunners were compared to Stoke by former United striker Dimitar Berbatov.
